tooling_sandboxing.detail: Enforced restriction shipped in the harness itself: path-level allow/deny rules in `settings.json` (e.g. patterns like "/etc/*") and a `denied_commands` list that explicitly rejects patterns like "DROP TABLE *", on top of a Plan Mode that "blocks all writes" outright.

context_memory.detail: "Auto-Compaction preserves task state and channel logs across context compression — agents can run multi-day sessions without manual compact/clear," plus a MEMORY.md persistent-memory subsystem and CLAUDE.md discovery/injection for durable knowledge across sessions.

lifecycle_hooks.detail: PreToolUse/PostToolUse event hooks combine with Multi-Level Permission Modes — Default ("ask before write/execute") and Plan Mode ("block all writes") — plus a denied_commands list, giving genuine before-execution blocking alongside after-the-fact audit hooks.

prompt_optimization.detail: "CLAUDE.md Discovery & Injection" is listed under the Context & Memory subsystem as a project-level system-prompt customization mechanism, with no automatic tuning loop described.

build_vs_buy.label: blueprint
build_vs_buy.detail: Self-hosted Python framework installed via `pip install openharness-ai`, running the bundled Ohmo agent on your existing Claude Code/Codex subscription — an opinionated runtime you configure and run, not a managed service.
